prompt: Close-up of freshly baked sourdough loaves cooling on a wire rack. Golden crusts with deep scoring patterns, flour dusted, steam still rising. Warm morning light from the left. Rustic wooden bakery counter. Artisan, handcrafted, warm. Editorial food photography, warm amber tones.

Elegant three-tier wedding cake on a marble stand. White buttercream with delicate wildflower decorations. Soft natural light, blurred bakery interior in background. Dreamy, celebratory, artisan. No people. Editorial food photography, soft warm tones.

Hands decorating a layer cake with buttercream using a piping bag. Close-up from the side, showing skilled hands and the cake surface. Flour-dusted apron visible. Warm kitchen lighting, shallow depth of field. Artisan, process-focused. Editorial food photography.

A happy couple in their early 30s at an outdoor party, holding plates with slices of cake. Natural light, slightly blurred garden party background with string lights. Genuine smiles, candid moment. Warm, celebratory. Editorial portrait photography, square crop.

Single sourdough loaf on a dark surface, cut in half showing the open crumb structure. Golden crust, airy interior with large irregular holes. Dramatic side lighting. Close-up, editorial food photography. Warm amber tones, square crop.

Three almond croissants on a baking tray, fresh from the oven. Toasted almond slices on top, dusted with powdered sugar. Morning light, warm golden tones. Overhead shot. Editorial food photography, square crop.

Lemon layer cake on a ceramic cake stand. Three visible layers with pale yellow frosting, thin lemon slices on top. Clean white surface, soft natural light. Elegant but unfussy. Editorial food photography, square crop.

Chocolate chip cookies scattered on parchment paper. Brown butter color, visible dark chocolate chunks, flaky sea salt crystals on top. Warm overhead light, rustic wood surface. Generous, homestyle. Editorial food photography, square crop.

Bakery display case from the customer side. Rows of pastries, bread loaves, and cakes behind curved glass. Warm interior lighting, clean white shelves. Abundant, inviting, organized. No people. Editorial interior photography, warm tones.

Baker's hands shaping bread dough on a floured marble surface. Close-up from above, showing skilled technique. Flour everywhere, rustic and real. Warm morning light. Artisan, process-focused. Editorial food photography.

Row of decorated celebration cakes on a long wooden shelf. Various sizes and styles — buttercream flowers, naked cakes, fondant designs. Soft, even lighting. Bakery showroom feel. No people. Editorial food photography, warm tones.

Three-tier wedding cake with white buttercream and cascading fresh wildflowers. On a marble stand, soft natural light from a window. Elegant, romantic, artisan. Editorial food photography, portrait orientation, warm soft tones.

Rich chocolate birthday cake with dark ganache drip and gold candles. Single tier on a dark plate. Moody lighting, dramatic. Close-up, slightly above. Editorial food photography, portrait orientation, rich dark tones.

Naked layer cake with visible layers of sponge and cream, topped with fresh seasonal berries — strawberries, blueberries, raspberries. On a wooden cake stand. Bright, natural light. Rustic elegance. Editorial food photography, portrait orientation.

Pastel pink and white buttercream baby shower cake with delicate rosette piping. Two tiers, small fondant flowers. On a white ceramic stand. Soft, feminine, celebratory. Editorial food photography, portrait orientation, pastel tones.

Lemon drizzle celebration cake with white glaze running down the sides, thin lemon slices on top, fresh herbs. Single tier on a blue ceramic plate. Bright, cheerful. Editorial food photography, portrait orientation, warm tones.

Modern geometric fondant anniversary cake. Clean sharp edges, two tiers, metallic gold accents on white fondant. Minimalist, contemporary. On a marble surface. Editorial food photography, portrait orientation, clean bright lighting.

Overhead shot of a bakery work surface covered in flour with various breads and pastries in progress. Rolling pins, dough balls, scored loaves, scattered flour. No people visible, just the beautiful chaos of a working bakery. Editorial food photography, warm tones.

Dramatic close-up of sourdough bread. Dark, caramelized crust with deep ear from scoring. Shot at a slight angle, warm side lighting creating deep shadows. Rich amber and brown tones. Hero image for a bento grid. Editorial food photography.
Basket of freshly baked butter croissants. Golden, flaky layers visible. Cloth napkin in the basket. Morning light, warm bakery counter. Inviting, abundant. Editorial food photography.
Close-up of a cinnamon roll being pulled apart, showing the swirled interior with cream cheese icing. Gooey, warm, indulgent. Shallow depth of field. Editorial food photography, warm tones.
Slice of layer cake on a small plate with a fork. Visible layers of sponge and filling. A bite taken. Clean surface, natural light. Simple, appetizing. Editorial food photography.
Stack of assorted cookies — chocolate chip, snickerdoodle, oatmeal — on a small wooden board. Warm, rustic, generous. Overhead angle, natural light. Editorial food photography.

Bakery glass display case filled with pastries, cakes, and bread. Customer perspective looking in. Clean, well-organized shelves. Warm interior lighting. Inviting, abundant. Editorial interior photography.
Baker's hands shaping a round loaf on a floured work surface. Close-up of the technique, flour-dusted fingers. Warm overhead light. Process, craftsmanship. Editorial food photography.
Commercial deck oven with the door open, bread loaves visible inside on the stone deck. Warm glow from the oven interior. Industrial but artisan. Editorial interior photography.

Small cafe seating area inside a bakery. Two or three small round tables, wooden chairs, a chalkboard menu on the wall. Morning light through a window, a coffee cup on one table. Cozy, neighborhood. Editorial interior photography.
Close-up of flour-dusted hands kneading dough. Strong, capable baker's hands working on a wooden surface. Flour cloud in the air. Warm side lighting. Raw, real, tactile. Editorial food photography.

Wooden shelving unit behind a bakery counter filled with different bread loaves — sourdough, baguettes, multigrain, rye. Organized rows, warm lighting. Bakery retail display. Abundant, curated. Editorial interior photography.

Bakery storefront exterior in morning light. Simple awning, a small A-frame chalkboard sign on the sidewalk, warm light glowing from inside. Neighborhood feel, inviting. No people. Editorial photography, warm tones.

Woman in her early 40s, Eastern European features, flour-dusted apron, hair tied back. Standing in a bakery kitchen, arms crossed, confident warm smile. Shelves of bread behind her. Natural light from a window. Authentic, strong, artisan. Editorial portrait photography.

A decorated cake in a bakery box being tied with a ribbon. Hands visible tying the bow. Warm counter, bakery interior in soft focus. The moment of handing over a finished order. Warm, personal. Editorial food photography.

Woman in her early 40s, Eastern European features, warm complexion, hair pulled back in a bun. Wearing a flour-dusted apron over a dark top. Confident, warm smile. Bakery kitchen in soft focus. Natural lighting. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.

Man in his early 30s, light skin, short curly brown hair. Wearing chef whites, slight flour dusting. Playful, focused expression. Pastry station with croissants in soft focus background. Natural lighting. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.

Woman in her late 20s, South Asian features, dark hair, warm smile. Wearing a dark apron, piping bag in hand or nearby. Decorated cakes in soft focus background. Natural lighting. Head and shoulders portrait, square crop. Editorial portrait photography.
